---
title: "05 Markov-Switching DFM — Out-of-Sample Evaluation (Server)"
author: "Weiyun Hong"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
  cache = FALSE
)
```

```{r load-packages, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(future)
library(future.apply)
source("ifo_data_processing.R")
```

```{r parallel-setup, include=FALSE}
plan(multisession, workers = 18)
cat("Workers:", nbrOfWorkers(), "\n")
```

This file performs the expanding-window out-of-sample evaluation for Appendix C.
At each evaluation month $t$, the TVTP and Fixed-TP models are re-estimated on
$\{1, \ldots, t\}$ using **only information available up to $t$** (no full-sample warm starts).
The one-step-ahead filtered probability is recorded and saved to
`output/ms_models/ms_oos_evaluation.rds`.

```{r load-data, include=FALSE}
dfm_state          <- readRDS("output/dfm_state_04.rds")
robustness_results <- readRDS("output/robustness_lco_0402.rds")

dates      <- dfm_state$dates
r          <- dfm_state$r
F_filtered <- robustness_results$F_baseline_filtered
leading_indicator_lco <- robustness_results$leading_indicator_lco

T_obs <- length(dates)

cat("Sample:", as.character(min(dates)), "to", as.character(max(dates)), "\n")
cat("T =", T_obs, ", r =", r, "\n")
```


```{r define-hamilton-filter}
# Hamilton Filter

hamilton_filter <- function(y, z, mu, phi, sigma,
                            gamma_01 = c(-2, 0), gamma_10 = c(-2, 0),
                            tvtp = FALSE) {
  T_obs <- length(y)
  prob_filtered <- matrix(NA, T_obs, 2)
  prob_smoothed <- matrix(NA, T_obs, 2)
  loglik <- 0

  if (tvtp) {
    p_01 <- pnorm(gamma_01[1] + gamma_01[2] * z)
    p_10 <- pnorm(gamma_10[1] + gamma_10[2] * z)
  } else {
    p_01 <- rep(pnorm(gamma_01[1]), T_obs)
    p_10 <- rep(pnorm(gamma_10[1]), T_obs)
  }
  p_01 <- pmax(pmin(p_01, 0.999), 0.001)
  p_10 <- pmax(pmin(p_10, 0.999), 0.001)
  p_00 <- 1 - p_01; p_11 <- 1 - p_10

  denom <- (2 - p_00[1] - p_11[1])
  if (abs(denom) < 1e-8) {
    prob_prev <- c(0.5, 0.5)
  } else {
    pi_0 <- (1 - p_11[1]) / denom; pi_1 <- (1 - p_00[1]) / denom
    prob_prev <- c(max(min(pi_0, 0.99), 0.01), max(min(pi_1, 0.99), 0.01))
    prob_prev <- prob_prev / sum(prob_prev)
  }

  for (t in 1:T_obs) {
    prob_pred <- c(p_00[t] * prob_prev[1] + p_10[t] * prob_prev[2],
                   p_01[t] * prob_prev[1] + p_11[t] * prob_prev[2])
    prob_pred <- pmax(prob_pred, 1e-10)
    prob_pred <- prob_pred / sum(prob_pred)
    y_pred <- if (t == 1) mu else mu + phi * (y[t-1] - mu)
    dens <- pmax(dnorm(y[t] - y_pred, sd = sigma), 1e-300)
    prob_update <- dens * prob_pred
    marg_lik <- sum(prob_update)
    if (marg_lik < 1e-300) { prob_update <- prob_pred
    } else { prob_update <- prob_update / marg_lik; loglik <- loglik + log(marg_lik) }
    prob_filtered[t, ] <- prob_update
    prob_prev <- prob_update
  }

  # Kim smoother
  prob_smoothed[T_obs, ] <- prob_filtered[T_obs, ]
  for (t in (T_obs - 1):1) {
    ppn <- c(p_00[t+1] * prob_filtered[t, 1] + p_10[t+1] * prob_filtered[t, 2],
             p_01[t+1] * prob_filtered[t, 1] + p_11[t+1] * prob_filtered[t, 2])
    ppn <- pmax(ppn, 1e-10)
    ratio <- pmin(pmax(prob_smoothed[t+1, ] / ppn, 0.001), 1000)
    prob_smoothed[t, ] <- prob_filtered[t, ] * c(
      p_00[t+1] * ratio[1] + p_01[t+1] * ratio[2],
      p_10[t+1] * ratio[1] + p_11[t+1] * ratio[2])
    prob_smoothed[t, ] <- pmax(prob_smoothed[t, ], 1e-10)
    prob_smoothed[t, ] <- prob_smoothed[t, ] / sum(prob_smoothed[t, ])
  }

  list(prob_filtered = prob_filtered, prob_smoothed = prob_smoothed,
       p_01 = p_01, p_10 = p_10, loglik = loglik)
}
```


```{r define-regime-helpers}
# Regime identification — identical to 05_MS_DFM_Bootstrap

identify_regime_swap <- function(mu, sigma) {
  sigma_ratio <- max(sigma) / max(min(sigma), 0.01)
  need_swap <- (sigma[1] > sigma[2])
  list(need_swap = need_swap, sigma_ratio = sigma_ratio)
}

swap_model <- function(m, has_gamma = FALSE) {
  m$mu    <- rev(m$mu);  m$phi <- rev(m$phi);  m$sigma <- rev(m$sigma)
  tmp <- m$gamma_01;  m$gamma_01 <- m$gamma_10;  m$gamma_10 <- tmp
  m$prob_filtered <- m$prob_filtered[, c(2, 1)]
  m$prob_smoothed <- m$prob_smoothed[, c(2, 1)]
  tmp_p <- m$p_01;  m$p_01 <- m$p_10;  m$p_10 <- tmp_p
  m
}
```


```{r define-oos-estimation}
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# estimate_ms_subsample(): re-estimation on subsample {1, ..., T_sub}
#
# NO full-sample warm start. All starting points are derived from the
# subsample data only, matching the structure of _Bootstrap's estimate_msdfm:
#   Fixed TP: 5 starts (2 structured + 3 random)
#   TVTP: n_starts (4 structured + 6 gamma grid + random)
#
# Regime normalisation uses identify_regime_swap() + swap_model(),
# identical to the main pipeline.
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

estimate_ms_subsample <- function(y, z_raw, n_starts = 15) {

  T_sub   <- length(y)
  y_sd    <- sd(y, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_range <- diff(range(y, na.rm = TRUE))
  mu_lower <- min(y, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.5 * y_range
  mu_upper <- max(y, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.5 * y_range

  # Pre-process z
  z_s <- z_raw[1:T_sub]
  z_s[z_s < quantile(z_s, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE)] <- quantile(z_s, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE)
  z_s[z_s > quantile(z_s, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)] <- quantile(z_s, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
  z_s <- scale(z_s)[, 1]
  z_s <- pmax(pmin(z_s, 3.5), -3.5)
  z_s <- c(0, z_s[-length(z_s)])  # lag one period

  # Data-driven initial values
  y_high <- y[y > quantile(y, 0.7, na.rm = TRUE)]
  y_low  <- y[y < quantile(y, 0.3, na.rm = TRUE)]

  mu_0_init    <- mean(y_high, na.rm = TRUE)
  mu_1_init    <- mean(y_low,  na.rm = TRUE)
  sigma_0_init <- max(sd(y_high, na.rm = TRUE), 0.1 * y_sd)
  sigma_1_init <- max(sd(y_low,  na.rm = TRUE), 0.1 * y_sd)
  phi_init     <- cor(y[-1], y[-T_sub], use = "complete.obs")
  phi_init     <- max(min(phi_init, 0.95), 0.3)

  # =====================================================================
  # STEP 1: Fixed TP (8 parameters)
  # 5 starting points (same structure as _Bootstrap lines 446-468)
  # =====================================================================

  neg_ll_fixed <- function(par) {
    mu <- par[1:2]; phi <- pmin(pmax(par[3:4], 0.1), 0.995)
    sigma <- exp(par[5:6])
    g01 <- c(pmin(pmax(par[7], -3.5), 0), 0)
    g10 <- c(pmin(pmax(par[8], -3.5), 0), 0)
    tryCatch({
      res <- hamilton_filter(y, z_s, mu, phi, sigma, g01, g10, tvtp = FALSE)
      penalty <- 0
      p01b <- pnorm(g01[1]); p10b <- pnorm(g10[1])
      dur0 <- 1 / pmax(p01b, 0.001); dur1 <- 1 / pmax(p10b, 0.001)
      if (dur0 < 3) penalty <- penalty + 50 * (3 - dur0)^2
      if (dur1 < 3) penalty <- penalty + 50 * (3 - dur1)^2
      if (p01b > 0.6 || p10b > 0.6) penalty <- penalty + 20
      -(res$loglik - penalty)
    }, error = function(e) 1e10)
  }

  fixed_starts <- list(
    c(mu_0_init, mu_1_init, phi_init, phi_init,
      log(sigma_0_init), log(sigma_1_init), -2.0, -1.5),
    c(mu_1_init, mu_0_init, phi_init, phi_init,
      log(sigma_1_init), log(sigma_0_init), -1.5, -2.0),
    NULL, NULL, NULL
  )
  for (k in 3:5) {
    fixed_starts[[k]] <- c(
      mu_0_init + rnorm(1, 0, y_sd * 0.3),
      mu_1_init + rnorm(1, 0, y_sd * 0.3),
      pmin(pmax(phi_init + rnorm(1, 0, 0.1), 0.3), 0.95),
      pmin(pmax(phi_init + rnorm(1, 0, 0.1), 0.3), 0.95),
      log(max(sigma_0_init * exp(rnorm(1, 0, 0.3)), 0.1)),
      log(max(sigma_1_init * exp(rnorm(1, 0, 0.3)), 0.1)),
      runif(1, -2.5, -0.5),
      runif(1, -2.5, -0.5)
    )
  }

  best_fixed_ll  <- -1e10
  best_fixed_par <- NULL

  for (s in fixed_starts) {
    opt <- tryCatch(
      optim(s, neg_ll_fixed, method = "L-BFGS-B",
            lower = c(mu_lower, mu_lower, 0.1, 0.1, -Inf, -Inf, -3.5, -3.5),
            upper = c(mu_upper, mu_upper, 0.995, 0.995, Inf, Inf, 0, 0),
            control = list(maxit = 2000)),
      error = function(e) {
        tryCatch(
          optim(s, neg_ll_fixed, method = "BFGS",
                control = list(maxit = 1000)),
          error = function(e2) list(value = 1e10, par = s))
      })
    ll <- tryCatch({
      p <- opt$par
      hamilton_filter(y, z_s, p[1:2], pmin(pmax(p[3:4], 0.1), 0.995),
                      exp(p[5:6]),
                      c(pmin(pmax(p[7], -3.5), 0), 0),
                      c(pmin(pmax(p[8], -3.5), 0), 0),
                      tvtp = FALSE)$loglik
    }, error = function(e) -1e10)
    if (is.finite(ll) && ll > best_fixed_ll) {
      best_fixed_ll  <- ll
      best_fixed_par <- opt$par
    }
  }

  if (is.null(best_fixed_par)) {
    return(list(p_tvtp_last = NA, p_fixed_last = NA,
                tvtp_loglik = NA, fixed_loglik = NA))
  }

  # Extract Fixed TP parameters
  mu_fixed    <- best_fixed_par[1:2]
  phi_fixed   <- pmin(pmax(best_fixed_par[3:4], 0.1), 0.995)
  sigma_fixed <- exp(best_fixed_par[5:6])
  g01_fixed   <- c(pmin(pmax(best_fixed_par[7], -3.5), 0), 0)
  g10_fixed   <- c(pmin(pmax(best_fixed_par[8], -3.5), 0), 0)

  flt_fixed <- hamilton_filter(y, z_s, mu_fixed, phi_fixed, sigma_fixed,
                               g01_fixed, g10_fixed, tvtp = FALSE)

  # Regime normalisation via identify_regime_swap + swap_model
  rid_fixed <- identify_regime_swap(mu_fixed, sigma_fixed)
  fixed_result <- list(
    mu = mu_fixed, phi = phi_fixed, sigma = sigma_fixed,
    gamma_01 = g01_fixed, gamma_10 = g10_fixed,
    prob_filtered = flt_fixed$prob_filtered,
    prob_smoothed = flt_fixed$prob_smoothed,
    p_01 = flt_fixed$p_01, p_10 = flt_fixed$p_10
  )
  if (rid_fixed$need_swap) fixed_result <- swap_model(fixed_result)
  p_fixed_last <- fixed_result$prob_filtered[T_sub, 2]

  # =====================================================================
  # STEP 2: TVTP (10 parameters)
  # n_starts total (same structure as _Bootstrap lines 711-755):
  #   1-4: structured from subsample's fixed result
  #   5-10: gamma_slope_starts grid
  #   11+: random perturbations
  # =====================================================================

  neg_ll_tvtp <- function(par) {
    mu <- par[1:2]; phi <- pmin(pmax(par[3:4], 0.1), 0.995)
    sigma <- exp(par[5:6])
    g01 <- c(pmin(pmax(par[7], -3.5), 0), par[8])
    g10 <- c(pmin(pmax(par[9], -3.5), 0), par[10])
    if (any(abs(c(g01[2], g10[2])) > 2.5)) return(1e10)
    tryCatch({
      res <- hamilton_filter(y, z_s, mu, phi, sigma, g01, g10, tvtp = TRUE)
      penalty <- 0
      p01b <- pnorm(g01[1]); p10b <- pnorm(g10[1])
      dur0 <- 1 / pmax(p01b, 0.001); dur1 <- 1 / pmax(p10b, 0.001)
      if (dur0 < 3) penalty <- penalty + 50 * (3 - dur0)^2
      if (dur1 < 3) penalty <- penalty + 50 * (3 - dur1)^2
      for (zv in c(-3, 0, 3)) {
        p01v <- pnorm(g01[1] + g01[2] * zv)
        p10v <- pnorm(g10[1] + g10[2] * zv)
        if (p01v > 0.7) penalty <- penalty + 30 * (p01v - 0.7)^2
        if (p10v > 0.7) penalty <- penalty + 30 * (p10v - 0.7)^2
      }
      -(res$loglik - penalty)
    }, error = function(e) 1e10)
  }

  # Use NORMALISED fixed result for starting points (post-swap)
  mu_f    <- fixed_result$mu
  phi_f   <- fixed_result$phi
  sigma_f <- fixed_result$sigma
  g01_f   <- fixed_result$gamma_01
  g10_f   <- fixed_result$gamma_10

  gamma_slope_starts <- c(-0.8, -0.5, -0.3, 0.3, 0.5, 0.8)

  tvtp_starts <- list(
    c(mu_f, phi_f, log(sigma_f), g01_f[1], 0, g10_f[1], 0),
    c(mu_f, phi_f, log(sigma_f), g01_f[1], -0.5, g10_f[1], 0.5),
    c(mu_f, phi_f, log(sigma_f), g01_f[1], 0.5, g10_f[1], -0.5),
    c(mu_f, phi_f, log(sigma_f), g01_f[1], -1.0, g10_f[1], 1.0)
  )
  for (k in seq_along(gamma_slope_starts)) {
    tvtp_starts[[4 + k]] <- c(
      mu_f, phi_f, log(sigma_f),
      g01_f[1], -abs(gamma_slope_starts[k]),
      g10_f[1],  abs(gamma_slope_starts[k])
    )
  }
  n_so_far <- length(tvtp_starts)
  n_random <- max(n_starts - n_so_far, 0)
  for (k in seq_len(n_random)) {
    tvtp_starts[[n_so_far + k]] <- c(
      mu_f + rnorm(2, 0, y_sd * 0.1),
      phi_f + rnorm(2, 0, 0.03),
      log(sigma_f) + rnorm(2, 0, 0.2),
      g01_f[1] + rnorm(1, 0, 0.3), rnorm(1, 0, 0.8),
      g10_f[1] + rnorm(1, 0, 0.3), rnorm(1, 0, 0.8)
    )
  }

  best_tvtp_ll  <- -1e10
  best_tvtp_par <- NULL

  for (s in tvtp_starts) {
    opt <- tryCatch(
      optim(s, neg_ll_tvtp, method = "L-BFGS-B",
            lower = c(mu_lower, mu_lower, 0.1, 0.1, -Inf, -Inf,
                      -3.0, -2.5, -3.0, -2.5),
            upper = c(mu_upper, mu_upper, 0.995, 0.995, Inf, Inf,
                      -0.3, 2.5, -0.3, 2.5),
            control = list(maxit = 2000)),
      error = function(e) {
        tryCatch(
          optim(s, neg_ll_tvtp, method = "BFGS",
                control = list(maxit = 3000)),
          error = function(e2) {
            tryCatch(
              optim(s, neg_ll_tvtp, method = "Nelder-Mead",
                    control = list(maxit = 5000)),
              error = function(e3) list(value = 1e10, par = s))
          })
      })
    ll <- tryCatch({
      p <- opt$par
      hamilton_filter(y, z_s, p[1:2], pmin(pmax(p[3:4], 0.1), 0.995),
                      exp(p[5:6]),
                      c(pmin(pmax(p[7], -3.5), 0), p[8]),
                      c(pmin(pmax(p[9], -3.5), 0), p[10]),
                      tvtp = TRUE)$loglik
    }, error = function(e) -1e10)
    if (is.finite(ll) && ll > best_tvtp_ll) {
      best_tvtp_ll  <- ll
      best_tvtp_par <- opt$par
    }
  }

  if (is.null(best_tvtp_par)) {
    return(list(p_tvtp_last = NA, p_fixed_last = p_fixed_last,
                tvtp_loglik = NA, fixed_loglik = best_fixed_ll))
  }

  # Extract TVTP parameters
  mu_tvtp    <- best_tvtp_par[1:2]
  phi_tvtp   <- pmin(pmax(best_tvtp_par[3:4], 0.1), 0.995)
  sigma_tvtp <- exp(best_tvtp_par[5:6])
  g01_tvtp   <- c(pmin(pmax(best_tvtp_par[7], -3.5), 0), best_tvtp_par[8])
  g10_tvtp   <- c(pmin(pmax(best_tvtp_par[9], -3.5), 0), best_tvtp_par[10])

  flt_tvtp <- hamilton_filter(y, z_s, mu_tvtp, phi_tvtp, sigma_tvtp,
                              g01_tvtp, g10_tvtp, tvtp = TRUE)

  # Regime normalisation via identify_regime_swap + swap_model
  rid_tvtp <- identify_regime_swap(mu_tvtp, sigma_tvtp)
  tvtp_result <- list(
    mu = mu_tvtp, phi = phi_tvtp, sigma = sigma_tvtp,
    gamma_01 = g01_tvtp, gamma_10 = g10_tvtp,
    prob_filtered = flt_tvtp$prob_filtered,
    prob_smoothed = flt_tvtp$prob_smoothed,
    p_01 = flt_tvtp$p_01, p_10 = flt_tvtp$p_10
  )
  if (rid_tvtp$need_swap) tvtp_result <- swap_model(tvtp_result, has_gamma = TRUE)
  p_tvtp_last <- tvtp_result$prob_filtered[T_sub, 2]

  list(
    p_tvtp_last  = p_tvtp_last,
    p_fixed_last = p_fixed_last,
    tvtp_loglik  = best_tvtp_ll,
    fixed_loglik = best_fixed_ll
  )
}
```


```{r run-oos-evaluation}
eval_start <- as.Date("2007-01-01")
eval_end   <- as.Date("2024-12-01")
t0_idx     <- which(dates >= eval_start)[1]
te_idx     <- max(which(dates <= eval_end))

eval_indices <- t0_idx:te_idx
eval_dates   <- dates[eval_indices]
n_eval       <- length(eval_indices)

cat("Evaluation window:", as.character(eval_start), "to",
    as.character(dates[te_idx]), "\n")
cat("Number of evaluation months:", n_eval, "\n")
cat("Initial training window: T =", t0_idx - 1, "months\n\n")

n_starts_tvtp <- 15

filtered_tvtp  <- vector("list", r)
filtered_fixed <- vector("list", r)

oos_partial_path <- "output/ms_models/ms_oos_partial.rds"
if (file.exists(oos_partial_path)) {
  .tmp <- readRDS(oos_partial_path)
  filtered_tvtp      <- .tmp$filtered_tvtp
  filtered_fixed     <- .tmp$filtered_fixed
  completed_factors  <- .tmp$completed_factors
  cat("Resumed from checkpoint: factors",
      paste(completed_factors, collapse = ", "), "done\n")
  rm(.tmp)
} else {
  completed_factors <- integer(0)
}

for (j in 1:r) {
  if (j %in% completed_factors) {
    cat("Factor", j, ": already completed — skipping.\n")
    next
  }

  cat("\n=== Factor", j, ": expanding-window evaluation ===\n")
  cat("  Evaluation months:", n_eval,
      "  TVTP starts per window:", n_starts_tvtp, "\n")

  y_full     <- F_filtered[, j]
  z_full_raw <- leading_indicator_lco[[paste0("Factor_", j)]]

  res_list <- future_lapply(seq_along(eval_indices), function(i) {
    t_end <- eval_indices[i]
    y_sub <- y_full[1:t_end]
    tryCatch(
      estimate_ms_subsample(y_sub, z_full_raw, n_starts = n_starts_tvtp),
      error = function(e) list(p_tvtp_last = NA, p_fixed_last = NA,
                               tvtp_loglik = NA, fixed_loglik = NA)
    )
  }, future.seed = 42)

  p_tvtp_vec  <- sapply(res_list, function(x) x$p_tvtp_last)
  p_fixed_vec <- sapply(res_list, function(x) x$p_fixed_last)

  filtered_tvtp[[j]]  <- p_tvtp_vec
  filtered_fixed[[j]] <- p_fixed_vec

  completed_factors <- c(completed_factors, j)

  cat("  Done. Non-NA:", sum(!is.na(p_tvtp_vec)), "/", n_eval, "\n")
  cat("  Mean P(Turb) TVTP:",  round(mean(p_tvtp_vec, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
      "  Fixed:", round(mean(p_fixed_vec, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")

  saveRDS(list(
    filtered_tvtp     = filtered_tvtp,
    filtered_fixed    = filtered_fixed,
    eval_dates        = eval_dates,
    eval_indices      = eval_indices,
    completed_factors = completed_factors,
    date_saved        = Sys.time()
  ), file = oos_partial_path)
  cat("  [Checkpoint saved: Factor", j, "]\n")
}

oos_final_path <- "output/ms_models/ms_oos_evaluation.rds"

saveRDS(list(
  filtered_tvtp     = filtered_tvtp,
  filtered_fixed    = filtered_fixed,
  eval_dates        = eval_dates,
  eval_indices      = eval_indices,
  n_eval            = n_eval,
  eval_start        = eval_start,
  eval_end          = eval_end,
  n_starts_tvtp     = n_starts_tvtp,
  specification     = "Expanding-window OOS: TVTP (10p) and Fixed TP (8p), subsample-only starting points",
  date_estimated    = Sys.time()
), file = oos_final_path)

cat("\n[Final OOS results saved to:", oos_final_path, "]\n")
```


```{r summary}
cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("OOS EVALUATION COMPLETE\n")
cat("==============================\n")
for (j in 1:r) {
  if (is.null(filtered_tvtp[[j]])) next
  cat("\nFactor", j, ":\n")
  cat("  TVTP  — mean P:", round(mean(filtered_tvtp[[j]], na.rm = TRUE), 3),
      "  max P:", round(max(filtered_tvtp[[j]], na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
  cat("  Fixed — mean P:", round(mean(filtered_fixed[[j]], na.rm = TRUE), 3),
      "  max P:", round(max(filtered_fixed[[j]], na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
}
```


```{r cleanup}
plan(sequential)
cat("Parallel workers shut down.\n")
```
